meaning: n.工作台,(有抽屉的)缝纫桌
examples: At a worktable inside the transformer plant, young Jason Stenquist looks flustered by the copper coils he's trying to assemble and the arrival of two visitors.
Fasten the pulley and the support block to your worktable.
This paper presents a new system for precisely positioning of the worktable.
The focal point is media:scape, a worktable that lets multiple users drag and share documents from their person devices.
HUNDRED-YEAR-OLD floors creak as James Sherraden's cowboy boots clomp to his worktable.
